Bash(powershell -c 'try { [System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadFile\('\\''C:\\Users\\Simone\\.nuget\\packages\\raylib-csharp\\4.0.1\\lib\\net8.0\\Raylib-CSharp.dll'\\''\).GetTypes\(\) | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq '\\''Input'\\'' } | ForEach-Object { $_.GetMethods\(\) | Where-Object { $_.Name -like '\\''*Mouse*'\\'' } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name } } catch { $_.Exception.LoaderExceptions[0].Message }')

Bash(powershell -c '$asm = [System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadFile\('\\''C:\\Users\\Simone\\.nuget\\packages\\raylib-csharp\\4.0.1\\lib\\net8.0\\Raylib-CSharp.dll'\\''\); try { $asm.GetTypes\(\) | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName | Where-Object { $_ -like '\\''*Input*'\\'' -or $_ -like '\\''*Mouse*'\\'' } } catch [System.Reflection.ReflectionTypeLoadException] { $_.Exception.Types | Where-Object { $_ -ne $null } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName | Where-Object { $_ -like '\\''*Input*'\\'' -or $_ -like '\\''*Mouse*'\\'' } }')

Bash(powershell -c '$asm = [System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadFile\('\\''C:\\Users\\Simone\\.nuget\\packages\\raylib-csharp\\4.0.1\\lib\\net8.0\\Raylib-CSharp.dll'\\''\); $types = @\(\); try { $types = $asm.GetTypes\(\) } catch { $types = $_.Exception.Types | Where-Object { $_ -ne $null } }; $types | Where-Object { $_.FullName -like '\\''*Interact*Input*'\\'' } | ForEach-Object { Write-Host $_.FullName; $_.GetMethods\(\) | Where-Object { $_.Name -like '\\''*Mouse*'\\'' } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name }')
